sources.label: LoRA-Leak arXiv
sources.notes: Membership inference attacks against LoRA fine-tuned models.

reference_repo_influences: paper2code: split paper-only LoRA leakage claims from code-confirmed decontamination mechanics.
DeepPaperNote: report keeps privacy risk and benchmark contamination risk distinct.
MinerU-Document-Explorer: future batch explorer can index leakage/decontamination papers together.
paper-qa: near-duplicate and leakage claims should be citation-grounded before becoming gate thresholds.
MinerU: full PDF/OCR pass is needed for exact LoRA-Leak and Leaner Training tables.
docling-mcp: conversion fallback supports source-bundle generation without training.
algorithm_traits: Semantic duplicate pruning via embeddings and clustering

maformac_insertion_points.recommendation: Extend candidate data quality gate with semantic overlap and leakage receipts.
Training outputs must preserve source snapshot references; no hidden train/eval reuse.
Held-out cases need family/template/semantic protection before C6 is a final gate.
Future C6 case metadata should include split family/template lineage.

openspec_candidates: Future C5 requirement: exact ID split SHALL NOT be sufficient for train-ready status.
Future C5/C6 design: semantic overlap scan SHALL be considered before adapter candidate signoff.

gate.rationale: Protects C5/C6 from exact-ID-only fake green and from overclaiming LoRA privacy safety.
stop_conditions: No train-ready declaration from exact-ID split alone.
No API-based decontamination on private/raw data without explicit authorization.
No raw customer/source material in repo.

residual_risks: Pack-level official_repo is intentionally not_applicable: llm-decontaminator and SemDeDup local-code evidence applies only to their own claims, not to Leaner Training or LoRA-Leak.
Leaner Training and LoRA-Leak are paper-only in this pass.
Semantic decontamination thresholds are not selected for MAformac yet.
OpenAI/API detector paths are unsuitable for private data without a separate redaction contract.
